welcome.tagline: Premium moving for homes, apartments, and businesses.
welcome.headline: Moving, reimagined.
welcome.sub: Family-owned. Fully licensed. Built for the DMV.

whyMarlon.headline: Why people choose Marlon.
whyMarlon.licensedBody: Your move is protected by a professional team with the paperwork to match.
whyMarlon.timeBody: Clear windows, confirmed crews, and a team that respects your calendar.
whyMarlon.familyBody: Careful packing, patient communication, and people who move like it matters.

howItWorks.headline: Three steps. No surprises.
howItWorks.quoteBody: Tell us the basics. Get a clear, flat-rate or hourly price in minutes.
howItWorks.dateBody: Pick a slot, confirm details, and we'll send a written confirmation.
howItWorks.moveBody: Our uniformed crew shows up on time, with the right gear, ready to work.

services.headline: Everything you need to move.
services.oneTimeDescription: Need a last-minute move in Sterling, Ashburn, or anywhere in Loudoun County? Our professional movers are ready on short notice with same-day availability.
services.residentialFullDescription: Trusted home movers in Sterling, Ashburn, and Loudoun County. Apartments, condos, townhomes, and single-family homes are moved with care by licensed, insured professionals.
services.commercialFullDescription: Sterling's trusted commercial movers handle offices, retail spaces, and corporate relocations with minimal downtime. After-hours and weekend moves are available across the Dulles Technology Corridor, Reston, Tysons, and Northern Virginia.
services.packingFullDescription: Professional packing crews serving Sterling, Ashburn, Herndon, and Loudoun County. Affordable packing kits, custom crating for fragile items, and same-day unpacking help you settle in faster.
services.loadingFullDescription: Already have a rental truck, PODS, or container? Our expert Northern Virginia crews maximize every cubic foot, protect your furniture, and handle the heavy lifting safely.
services.laborFullDescription: Flexible hourly labor for furniture rearranging, heavy lifting, staging, and more across Sterling, Ashburn, and Loudoun County. Skilled hands when and where you need them.
services.junkFullDescription: Fast, responsible junk removal in Sterling, Ashburn, and Loudoun County. Old furniture, appliances, yard debris, and garage cleanouts are hauled away with donation and recycling whenever possible.
services.assemblyFullDescription: Expert furniture disassembly and reassembly in Sterling and Northern Virginia. IKEA, Wayfair, bedroom sets, office workstations, and more are built correctly by licensed, insured technicians.
services.emergencyFullDescription: When disaster strikes in Sterling, Ashburn, or Northern Virginia, our emergency moving crew mobilizes within hours for water damage, fire, evictions, and other urgent situations.
services.boxTruckFullDescription: Reliable box truck delivery across Northern Virginia, Maryland, and DC for furniture pickups, Marketplace finds, estate sales, and multi-stop routes.
services.finalMileFullDescription: Professional final mile delivery from warehouse to customer door across Northern Virginia and the DMV, including white-glove, threshold, room-of-choice, assembly, and packaging removal options.
services.storageFullDescription: We handle pickup, delivery, packing, unpacking, and heavy lifting at storage facilities throughout Northern Virginia, DC, and Maryland.
services.movingDescription: Flexible moving help for planned moves, same-day needs, emergencies, and storage-unit transitions across Sterling, Ashburn, Loudoun County, and Northern Virginia.
services.movingIncluded: One-Time Moving Services|Residential Moving Services|Emergency Moving Services|Storage Unit Moving Services
services.businessDescription: Commercial relocations designed to minimize downtime, with after-hours and weekend availability throughout the Dulles Technology Corridor, Reston, Tysons, and Northern Virginia.
services.careDescription: Professional packing, unpacking, custom protection, and expert furniture disassembly and reassembly for homes and businesses.
services.handsDescription: Experienced crews for rental trucks, PODS, containers, heavy lifting, furniture rearranging, staging, loading, and unloading.
services.junkDescription: Furniture, appliances, yard debris, and garage cleanouts hauled away responsibly, with donation and recycling whenever possible.
services.deliveryDescription: Professional box-truck and final-mile delivery across Northern Virginia, Maryland, DC, and the DMV, including white-glove and room-of-choice options.
services.deliveryIncluded: Box Truck Delivery Services|Final Mile Delivery Services
services.localDescription: Smooth moves across town, from apartment walk-ups to single-family homes. We plan the details, protect your space, and keep the day moving.
services.localIncluded: Home protection|Furniture wrapping|Loading, transport, and placement
services.longDescription: A calmer way to move farther. We coordinate timing, inventory, and handoff details so your move feels controlled from first box to final room.
services.residentialDescription: Designed for real homes and real life: stairs, elevators, tight corners, children, pets, and the things you care about most.
services.residentialIncluded: Room-by-room placement|Careful handling|Floor and doorway protection
services.commercialDescription: Office and business moves that respect your operating hours, equipment, and team productivity.
services.packingDescription: From fragile kitchens to full-home packing, we bring the right materials and a methodical crew.
services.packingIncluded: Boxes and wrap|Fragile-item packing|Labeling and organization
services.laborShort: Extra hands when you need them
services.laborDescription: Labor-only storage loading & unloading, truck loading, pod loading, and rearranging help when you already have the transport handled.

getStarted.headline: Let's get you moving.
getStarted.sub: Create an account to save quotes, track your move, and message your crew.
getStarted.saveBody: Access and manage all your quotes in one place.
getStarted.trackBody: Real-time updates from pickup to delivery.
getStarted.messageBody: Chat directly with your moving team.
